The Record Attempt

Making History.
One Interview at a Time.

The Longest Interview Marathon is an official Guinness World Records™ attempt at Takoradi Mall, Ghana. Nathaniel Yalley will conduct non-stop interviews for 72+ hours — a feat of endurance, storytelling, and human connection unlike anything Ghana has seen.

Every conversation is a chapter. Every guest, a story. From politicians and musicians to athletes, clergy, and content creators — this is more than a record. It is a movement for Ghana and Africa.

72+
Target Hours
144–160
Guest Interviews

ATTEMPT

Your Host

Meet the Man Behind the Mic

Nathaniel Yalley
Record Attempt Host

Visionary • Changemaker • Record-Breaker

Nathaniel Yalley

Nathaniel Yalley is a young Ghanaian changemaker using media, creativity, and entrepreneurship to inspire a generation. As the visionary behind the Interview Marathon project approved by Guinness World Records, he is committed to pushing limits, empowering youth, and making history.

MediaEntrepreneurship Ghana 🇬🇭Youth Empowerment GWR™ ApprovedNatVibe Studios

Be Part of the Marathon

Call for Guest

Want to be interviewed during the Longest Interview Marathon? Fill in the form below to apply. Everyone can submit an application — spots are reviewed and confirmed by our team.

ⓘ How it works: Submitting this form does not automatically book you a slot. Our admin team will review your application and reach out to you directly (by phone, email, or WhatsApp) if you are approved.

📅 Schedule a Reminder
Pick a guest, write a message, and choose the date it should go out. It sends automatically that morning — even if you're offline or your phone is off. Checked once daily; if you set today's date and it's already past the morning check, it goes out with the very next check.
